name: terapagos
flavor_texts: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.
It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.
text: Terapagos is the Tera Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: tera-shift. Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 65, Defense: 85, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 85, Speed: 60. Evolution line: terapagos. Lore: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon. It’s thought that this Pokémon lived in ancient Paldea until it got caught in seismic shifts and went extinct.
